description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for addition with regrouping/carrying for 4-5 digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent 2-digit regrouping skills, can fast-track to 4-5 digit with challenge

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready, provide complete systematic coverage of regrouping

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in 2-digit regrouping or place value trades, needs targeted review

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

exampleSequence.reason: Review: Place value trades (10 ones = 1 ten)
Review: Addition facts with sums over 10

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant review of 2-digit regrouping and place value trades before 4-5 digit regrouping

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with 4-5 digit regrouping.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

place_value_trades.conceptName: Understanding trading 10 ones for 1 ten, etc.

addition_facts_over10.conceptName: Addition facts that result in sums over 10

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: What is 2,567 + 1,845?
questions.explanation: Ones: 7+5=12 (write 2, carry 1). Tens: 6+4+1=11 (write 1, carry 1). Hundreds: 5+8+1=14 (write 4, carry 1). Thousands: 2+1+1=4 → 4,412.

questions.question: In 3,478 + 2,356, which place values will need regrouping?
questions.explanation: Ones: 8+6=14 (regroup), Tens: 7+5+1=13 (regroup). Hundreds: 4+3=7 (no regroup), Thousands: 3+2=5 (no regroup).

ifAllCorrect.message: Excellent! You understand single regrouping well.

ifCorrect.reason: Student ready for complex regrouping problems

skip_ahead.action: Skip mixed practice, jump to challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review on 2-digit regrouping

suggest_break.trigger: After 3 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend practicing 10-15 regrouping problems with parent/teacher

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You have strong 2-digit regrouping skills. You're ready to learn 4-5 digit regrouping. We've created a fast-track playlist with challenge content.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand regrouping basics. Let's extend your skills to 4-5 digit numbers with complete systematic coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in 2-digit regrouping or place value trades. Don't worry! We'll start with targeted review videos on the concepts you need.

low_score.message: You need to review 2-digit regrouping and place value trades first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how regrouping skills build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 75% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

regroupingAccuracy.description: % of students who can correctly add 4-5 digit numbers with regrouping

speedFluency.description: % of students who complete 10 regrouping problems in < 12 minutes with 80%+ accuracy

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 90-100% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 37-42 minutes with 80-90% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 52-58 minutes with 70-80% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (40 min) + retake + main content (25 min) = 65-75 total minutes, expected 65-80% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students forgetting to carry/regroup when sum >= 10
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize checking each column: if sum is 10 or more, write ones digit and carry the ten. Use visual cue: circle sums >= 10
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students writing both digits instead of carrying
commonChallenges.solution2: Practice writing the carry number small above the next column. Show incorrect vs correct notation side-by-side
commonChallenges.challenge3: Students losing track of carries with multiple regroupings
commonChallenges.solution3: Work systematically right to left, mark each carry clearly above column, cross out after adding it in
commonChallenges.challenge4: Students confused when zeros are involved in regrouping
commonChallenges.solution4: Remind: 0 + any number + carry = that number + carry. Zeros don't change the regrouping process, treat them like any other digit
